meta.title: Contact Us - PrimeReach
meta.description: Contact PrimeReach for support, questions, or assistance with the platform.

fields.heading: Contact Us
fields.body: Have questions or need assistance? We are here to help. Choose the best way to reach us below.

fields.heading: Program Contact
fields.body:
Small Business Supportive Services

Phone: (916) 324-1700
Email: info@primereachgov.com
Hours: Monday - Friday, 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM PST

For general inquiries about the program, certification, or technical assistance.

fields.heading: Technical Support
fields.body:
Platform Technical Support

Email: info@primereachgov.com
Response Time: Within 1 business day

For issues with logging in, uploading documents, or other technical problems.

fields.heading: Mailing Address
fields.body:
California Department of Transportation
Office of Business and Economic Opportunity
1120 N Street, MS-79
Sacramento, CA 95814

For physical mail and document submissions.
